data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for credit rollover for unused time, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the rollover of unused hours, but there is no direct evidence or checks to substantiate that this requirement is fully satisfied. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API checks provided to confirm the implementation of credit rollover for unused time.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
